## Affected packages

- [ ] `@onesub/shared`
- [ ] `@onesub/server`
- [ ] `@onesub/sdk`
- [ ] `@onesub/mcp-server`

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] **Breaking change** — requires a `docs/MIGRATION.md` entry
- [ ] Docs / tests / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` clean
- [ ] Ran `npm run changeset` and committed the generated `.changeset/*.md` (skip for docs/tests/CI/examples-only changes)
- [ ] Added entry to [docs/MIGRATION.md](../docs/MIGRATION.md) (breaking changes only)
- [ ] Did not paste raw JWS / purchase tokens / shared secrets in the diff or description
